subcodes.title: Words spoken in Sep. 1911 in London
subcodes.first_line: It is nearly two thousand years since His holiness the Lord Christ taught this prayer to His people: "Thy Kingdom come, Thy will be done on earth, as it is in Heaven
subcodes.subjects: @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @predictions and prophecies, @Christ; Christianity, @prophecy and fulfillment, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible
